frontMatter.title: The Sound of fddl
frontMatter.description: My musical journey, hosted on a subdomain and powered by fddl.

content:
Latest Releases

Welcome to my dedicated music page. Here you’ll find my latest tracks, experiments, and distribution links.

  • Starlight (2026) - Electronic / Synthwave

  • Deep Space (Coming Soon) - Ambient

  • Neon Pulse (Coming Soon) - Retrowave

Why a dedicated subdomain?

I wanted to separate my technical projects from my creative ones while still using the same underlying technology. By hosting this at music.fddl.dev, I can create a unique aesthetic experience tailored for listening.

VISITORS: 81622
rawMarkdown:
## Latest Releases

Welcome to my dedicated music page. Here you'll find my latest tracks, experiments, and distribution links.

- **[Starlight](/music/starlight.html)** (2026) - Electronic / Synthwave
- **[Deep Space](/music/deep-space.html)** (Coming Soon) - Ambient
- **[Neon Pulse](/music/neon-pulse.html)** (Coming Soon) - Retrowave

### Why a dedicated subdomain?

I wanted to separate my technical projects from my creative ones while still using the same underlying technology. By hosting this at `music.fddl.dev`, I can create a unique aesthetic experience tailored for listening.
